title: elaeocarpus batudulangii
intro: Elaeocarpus batudulangii, also known as the Batudulan tree, is a plant species native to the Philippines. It is a tree in the Elaeocarpus genus, belonging to the family Elaeocarpaceae, and is valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as digestive problems and skin conditions. Elaeocarpus batudulangii is often prepared as an herbal tea or infused in oil to maximize its health benefits, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
